toolCatalog.name: query_metrics
toolCatalog.description: Read one bounded service metric. Read-only.

toolCatalog.name: inspect_deployment
toolCatalog.description: Inspect releases and rollout state. Read-only.

toolCatalog.name: read_runbook
toolCatalog.description: Read the relevant operations runbook. Read-only.

toolCatalog.name: dependency_status
toolCatalog.description: Inspect a named upstream dependency. Read-only.

toolCatalog.name: rollback_deployment
toolCatalog.description: Roll a service back. Requires explicit grader approval.

toolCatalog.name: scale_service
toolCatalog.description: Change replica count within the supplied ceiling.

toolCatalog.name: disable_feature
toolCatalog.description: Disable a feature flag. Requires explicit grader approval.

toolCatalog.name: open_incident
toolCatalog.description: Open a linked incident for a service or dependency.

toolCatalog.name: no_action
toolCatalog.description: Record that no external effect is justified.
